chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1630 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 14.12.2016. Mr. Abdul Ghaffar Malik, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Mumtaz Alam Laghari, Advocate a/w respondents No.6 & 7. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G a/w ASI Ghulam Qadir Jalbani, SHO P.S Mari Jalbani, Shaheed Benazirabad. = Today, all the respondents are present alongwith their Counsel Mr. Mumtaz Alam Laghari, who denies the allegation of highhandedness on the part of respondents. However, petitioners’ Counsel, who is present alongwith petitioners, has reiterated their apprehension that even last evening the private respondents have visited the residence of the petitioners and have demanded an amount of Rs.500,000/- in lieu of marriage as the daughter of respondent No.4-Dharmo has been married to brother-in-law of petitioner No.1-Chetan. The learned Assistant A.G is present today and undertakes that in order to avoid any law and order situation in the locality, the Police will be given specific instructions that they should provide protection to the petitioners and will ensure that no individual, either petitioners or respondents, should be allowed to take law in their hands. ASI Ghulam Qadir Jalbani, SHO P.S Mari Jalbani District Shaheed Benazirabad present in Court today is further directed to ensure that no untoward incident takes place. With the above observations and directions, the present constitutional petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
